title: Project Niflheim
description: Project Niflheim is a Minecraft mod that adds a new dimension called Niflheim inspired by Norse Mythology. It features new types of weapons, a bit of magic, new mobs, new dungeons, and more!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfefddc3f6185d926f94829aba5f67fe687618b4_0.webp)

Welcome to Project Niflheim

**Project Niflheim** is an Adventure RPG Minecraft mod that adds a new dimension called Niflheim inspired by Norse Mythology. It features new types of weapons, a bit of magic, new mobs, new dungeons, and more! If you're looking for challenging RPG mods. Then this one is for you! Are you ready to explore the **Realm of the Dead**?
[![discord_btn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/750dbb318ea93b073356b5f7654e1c1bce7a5224.png)](https://discord.gg/bjBBFaqa7b)

How to start?

You can craft Niflheim Portal frames like so ![portalframerecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72b09a23b6aa3a7a0f0856cafd9e3f34000fd71e.png) And build the portal's frame just as you do with the Nether Portal ![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1186256b4a5ee43d574d62440bb9c2b14585df88_0.webp) Then you activate the portal with **Powder Snow Bucket**
**[ ! ]** Spoiler Alert Below _(Anything presented in the screenshots may change overtime)_ *JEI support for **Cryo Chamber** recipes now available!* *This mod does not support Shaders yet!*

Odin's Einherjars** ![einherjar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6856e927ad25646b9c22ffdf832b53684fa39189_0.webp) *Vanilla mobs such as Skeleton Horse
### Bosses
Spoiler **1. Garmr The Gatekeeper** ![garmrthegatekeeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338122290fab37c233726eb9c2a7c41842587c04_0.webp) Abilities : - Summon up to 2 Niflheim Hounds - Lightning Magic **2. Draugr Runecaster** ![draugr_runecaster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf018c9dca121ad4b2d8ef164fd22a40d0c7add5_0.webp) Abilities : - Summon 3 Unarmed Skeletons - Ranged Projectile attack that does Wither damage - Self Regeneration at 50% health - Self Fall Damage Nullification
The rest is for you to discover. More contents to come! _(Project Niflheim is a standalone project and has no affiliations with other Niflheim mods!)_
